subject: Week in Review
body:
Trump - Make America Great Again!
| |

\- December 20 2015 -
Week in Review

| Dear Peter Willis, It was another incredible week on the campaign trail!I started the week in Las Vegas, Nevada where we hosted thousands of people the night before the fifth GOP Presidential debate. Prior to the debate, I spent time at Trump International Hotel, Las Vegas. It is a beautiful property and one of my favorite deals. I employ hundreds of people and I'm really proud of the job they do.
_Greeting the crowd at our Las Vegas, Nevada pre-debate rally_Tuesday night I was center stage at the Republican Presidential Debate on CNN. It was widely reported that I won all of the post-debate polls including Drudge, Slate, Time, PBS, and many others.
_Speaking at the Republican Presidential Debate, 12/15/15_
_The polls show it - I won the debate!_
_Being interviewed for O'Reilly 12/16/15_ On Wednesday, we flew from Las Vegas to Mesa, Arizona. It was amazing to see so many great people at the rally held in a huge airport hangar. My friend, [Jamiel Shaw, whose son was tragically murdered by an illegal immigrant](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-vftdik-drdiuiutjh-j/), joined me and spoke to the crowd about the need to build a wall and other measures to stop illegal immigration. He is a really amazing person and I am proud to know him. Before my speech, I was [interviewed by Bill O'Reilly](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-vftdik-drdiuiutjh-t/). After my speech, we flew from Arizona to Los Angeles and I had some fun with [Jimmy Kimmel on ABC](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-vftdik-drdiuiutjh-i/).
_Arriving at the Mesa, Arizona rally
_
_Being interviewed by Jimmy Kimmel on 12/16/15_ On Thursday, I was [interviewed by Sean Hannity](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-vftdik-drdiuiutjh-d/) and was one of Barbara Walter's [10 Most Fascinating People of the Year.](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-vftdik-drdiuiutjh-h/) What a great honor! Thursday night, I was joined by my family for our annual Christmas Party where we celebrated the incredible company we have built, the accomplishments of the past year and all of the great people that work with us.On Saturday, I returned to Iowa for a special Christmas themed rally in Cedar Rapids. I spoke about my love for Iowa and it's importance to me as well as all the serious issues we are facing, especially defeating terrorism and stopping illegal immigration. My son Don Jr. brought his family and my grandchildren Kai and Donnie wished everyone a Merry Christmas!
_The beautiful stage in Cedar Rapids, Iowa_ We had some incredible polls this week, with the latest numbers showing me with a bigger lead than ever before. [Washington Post/ABC News](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-vftdik-drdiuiutjh-k/) shows me with 38% and the next candidate with only 15%. [FOX News](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-vftdik-drdiuiutjh-u/) shows me in the lead with 39% and my closest rival at only 16%. And the highly respected [Monmouth University](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-vftdik-drdiuiutjh-o/) poll shows me in first place with a commanding lead and 41%!
_One of the many polls I am leading_ On Monday I will host a [rally in Grand Rapids, Michigan](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-vftdik-drdiuiutjh-b/). It will be my second visit to Michigan and I am really looking forward to it.If I am elected President, America can, and will, be better than ever before. With your support, we will Make America Great Again! Wishing you a Christmas season filled with warmth and blessings.Merry Christmas and God Bless, Donald J. TrumpP.S. Visit the store at [Shop.DonaldJTrump.com](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-vftdik-drdiuiutjh-n/) to get all the best official campaign apparel – they make great Christmas gifts!
---

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Important Update on My Campaign
body:
LindseyGraham.com

Please watch this important video about the future of my
campaign.

Dear Friend,

Since launching my campaign for president on June 1st, I have
offered a path to saving the American Dream and working together
on bold solutions to solve big problems. This has been a problem
solvers' campaign. I have tried to be honest with the American
people, look for realistic ways to get things done, and inject a
little humor along the way.

Most importantly, the centerpiece of my campaign has been
securing our nation. I have offered a detailed plan to win a war
we cannot afford to lose and to turn back the tide of
isolationism that has been rising in the Republican Party.

I believe we have made enormous progress in this effort. Four
months ago at the very first debate, I said that any candidate
who did not understand that we need more troops on the ground in
Iraq and Syria to defeat ISIL was not ready to be Commander in
Chief. At the time, no one stepped forward to join me. Today,
most of my fellow candidates have come to recognize this is
what's needed to secure our homeland.

While we have run a campaign that has made a real difference, I
have concluded this is not my time. Please watch this important
video about the future of my campaign.

I want to thank you for standing with me. More than you will ever
know, you have honored me with your support. I hope we have run a
campaign in which you have been proud. I know I am, and I know
that together we have won an important contest of ideas.

God bless our men and women in uniform, and God bless America.

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham
United States Senator

Paid for by Lindsey
Graham 2016

name: Rand Paul
subject: Fed lobbyists already scheming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot:

As I announced late on Friday, the U.S.
Senate will vote on my Audit the Fed Bill on January 12th.

It's a vote I've been working hard for ever
since my election to the U.S. Senate five years ago.

But with the vote rapidly approaching, right
now is an absolutely critical time . . .

I'm sure slick lobbyists and Federal Reserve
apologists are already busy pressing my Senate colleagues hard to
ensure the Fed's most critical operations stay "off limits" to
the American people.

That's why I need to know if you stand with
me right away.

Will you please agree to your most generous
contribution of $20.16 or more today?

If my colleagues see a sudden surge of
momentum for my campaign from supporters like you, it could make
all the difference.

I believe we simply cannot allow this
secretive institution to wield so much power over the American
economy while operating without oversight of many of its most
critical and impactful decisions.

With your help, my Audit the Fed Bill will
expose the Federal Reserve's:

Aiding and abetting big spending
politicians in Congress by simply printing more money to pay the
bills - destroying the dollar and driving the costs of
necessities sky-high - when all of Washington, D.C.'s taxes and
borrowing still don't make ends meet;
Corruption, cronyism, and the incredible
power these unelected financiers wield over our economy;
Interest-rate manipulation, "Quantitative
Easing," and secret bailouts, which simply paper over our
economic problems and lead to worse economic conditions.

The good news is, nearly eight out of ten
Americans believe the Federal Reserve should be audited.

But polls are no substitute for action.

With just weeks to mobilize, I must be able
to count on your support.

I believe this vote could come down to the
wire.

You can count on me to fight with everything
I have.

But as I mentioned, a sudden surge of
momentum for my campaign could make all the difference!

So please agree to your most generous
contribution of $20.16 or more TODAY!

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

GIVE $25 TODAY >>

GIVE $50 TODAY >>

GIVE $75 TODAY >>

GIVE $100 TODAY >>

Or donate another
amount >>

subject: Shhh...it's Ted's Birthday
body:
CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

Friend, I need your help to surprise Ted. He's turning 45
tomorrow, and with your help, I want to surprise him with a
special birthday card signed by you!

Friend,

I need your help to surprise Ted.

He's turning 45 tomorrow, and with your help, I want to surprise
him with a special birthday card signed by you!
Click here to sign your own personalized birthday card for Ted.

As you know, Ted has been hard at work on the campaign trail --
traveling all across the country, making hundreds of phone calls
each day, and listening to voters.

Ted's sacrificing a great deal and putting tremendous effort into
running a winning campaign.

But, to win, he needs to hear from you -- I know a personal
birthday message from you would absolutely make his day.

Your words of support are a constant source of encouragement and
energy for Ted.

I want to surprise Ted and see how many people we can get to sign
his birthday card.

Click here and help me wish my husband, Ted, a happy birthday,
and in honor of his 45th birthday -- chip in $45 to help him
become the 45th President of the United States.
I know it'll mean the world to him.

Thanks for all that you do,

Heidi Cruz

body:
Peter, I'm writing you from our campaign bus in New Hampshire
today. It's hard to believe but we're only 50 days away from the
New Hampshire Primary!

Our daughters Emma & Reese are on the road with us today
and we're all having a lot of fun campaigning in the Granite
State!

Will you consider chipping in $5, $50 or more right now
to help show your support? There is a critical fundraising
deadline at the end of the month!

John is a great husband & father and while he may be the
candidate who's most ready to do the job on day one, he also has
a big heart and works to ensure that we're also creating better
opportunities & lifting those who need our help.

As Governor of Ohio, he has a proven record of
accomplishment - creating jobs, cutting taxes and balancing our
budgets. What's been done in Ohio can be done in America.

Please consider making a generous contribution right now
to help support our get-out-the-vote programs or sign up to
volunteer! JohnKasich.com/Volunteer

Thank you for your support!

-Karen

Karen Kasich
JohnKasich.com

name: Rand Paul
subject: Have you seen this yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Patriot-
Do conservative principles change based on
which way the political winds are blowing?
Can our party afford a nominee who we've seen
say one thing one day and another the next?
Patriot, these are very serious questions.
And I need to be 100% crystal clear here . . .
Senator Cruz has been an ally on some issues
when he's decided that's the best way to advance his ambition.
But as you'll see from my campaign's new ad, Senator Cruz's
finger-in-the-wind conservatism is no substitute for the real
thing.
Now, I'm hoping you'll agree to your most
generous contribution of $20.16 or more to help my campaign show
this ad to the American people.

As you'll see from this ad, Senator Cruz has
time-and-again flipped-flopped on key issues like:
*** Voting to support ObamaTrade and hand
President Obama's administration massive new powers, before
getting an earful from grassroots and opposing it;
*** Voting to reauthorize the so-called
"PATRIOT Act" after campaigning against this radical infringement
on Americans' civil liberties;
*** Supporting legalization for illegal
immigrants in 2013 before adopting Donald Trump's deportation
scheme as his own;
*** Mouthing support for a realist foreign
policy at times, but then adopting the invade-first, think-later
rhetoric used by the worst of the neoconservatives;
*** Saying we should continue to open our
doors to dangerous refugees from the Middle East before agreeing
with me that we must seal our borders and ensure that we vet
everyone who is coming into our country for national security.
Patriot, how many times have we been betrayed
by candidates who tickle our ears in order to get our votes, but
hand us nothing but broken promises once elected?
If we're honest with ourselves, most of those
times, we should have seen it coming . . .
This time is no different.
I believe this election is too important to
hand to a reality-show TV star.
It's too important to hand to politicians who
will play games with us.
And it's far too important to hand to someone
who has to read the political winds before figuring our where he
stands.
Patriot, we can't get fooled again.
Not if America is going to regain the promise
of freedom that has always been our heritage.
Not if we're ever going to dig ourselves out
of our nearly $18.8 TRILLION in debt.
We need a candidate we can trust to stand
strong and fight -- even when it's not easy.
I ran for the U.S. Senate for the same reason
I'm running for President now.
I'm running because we need a new direction.
I'm running because we need to get Big Government out of our
lives.
Those are my core convictions -- and they
always will be.
Patriot, if you want a new direction in
Washington, D.C., I must ask for your most generous contribution
of $50, $25 or even $10 right away.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

PITCH IN $25 TODAY >>

PITCH IN $50 TODAY >>

PITCH IN $75 TODAY >>

PITCH IN $100 TODAY>>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: They're out in full force
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

I can't do it alone. Right wing Republicans are out in full force, doing absolutely everything they can to turn back the clock on women's health care, take away access to health care for families, and block progress on so many of the middle class priorities that I and other Democrats are fighting for. We've been able to stop the worst of these attacks so far, but this year's election will be absolutely _critical_ in determining if we can keep this up in 2017. The progress we've made for women and middle class families and everything we want to do to build on that progress is under threat. I am doing my best to fight back, but I can't do it alone. **That 's why I'm supporting Katie McGinty for U.S. Senate. I need Katie to join me in Washington so that together, we can fight back against these Republican attacks and make progress for middle class families.** [**Katie needs another 42 donors to step up before****December 22**** to stay on track with her campaign. Can you chip in to help?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8290954398037704704/-3827475842590572544?refcode=e20151221&refcode2=e20151221nd&amount=5) I was the first female senator ever elected from Washington state, and I certainly understand the challenges women face in politics today. But as first female Chair of the Senate Veterans Affairs Committee, and the first female Chair of the Senate Budget Committee--I know the difference women can make when we get involved and fight to make a difference. **That 's exactly what Katie McGinty is doing now. Katie is running to become the first female senator from Pennsylvania, and I'm supporting her because I need her help in Washington.** The race in Pennsylvania could absolutely be _ the _race that determines control of the U.S. Senate. Losing this race hurts our chances to continue protecting women's health care, confirming pro-choice judges to the Supreme Court, and taking on important issues like paid sick leave and equal pay. **That 's why I need Katie and why Katie needs you. ** [**Click here to contribute to Katie 's campaign, so that we can send a champion for women to Washington and put the Senate back in Democratic hands, where women's health care and rights will _always_ be protected.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8290954398037704704/-3827475842590572544?refcode=e20151221&refcode2=e20151221nd&amount=5) Thank you,
Patty Murray
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8290954398037704704/-3827475842590572544?refcode=e20151221&refcode2=e20151221nd&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

body:
---
PETITION: [Call on Republicans to denounce violence against women's health clinics >>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea76c/e60883a/7024ef30/14420e95/1449634896/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Stop-Inciting-Violence?fname=&lname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")
* * *
_Words can kill._

Never has that been more apparent than last month, when a gunman opened fire at a Planned Parenthood clinic in Colorado, killing three people.

The shooter referred to himself as "a warrior for babies." Friends, it's apparent that he was incited by recent GOP rhetoric regarding the practices of Planned Parenthood.

**Politicians and media pundits need to recognize that their words can lead to violence._Especially when what they 're saying is blatantly not true._**

That's why we're joining a wide coalition of Democratic organizations to call on our Republican friends across the aisle to dial down their inflammatory rhetoric, and denounce this vile attack.

**JOIN US:[Sign your name to demand GOP leaders denounce violence against women's health care clinics >>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea76c/e60883a/7024ef30/14420e95/1449634896/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Stop-Inciting-Violence?fname=&lname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")**

Honestly, the rise of race-baiting Donald Trump and bully Chris Christie exemplify just how far the GOP crossed the boundaries of responsible political dialogue.

They frame it as "confronting political correctness" or "speaking the truth." Except what they're forgetting is that first and foremost, our national leaders have a responsibility to advocate for the safety of all Americans.

Republicans must recognize that their hateful words are contributing to the already shocking level of violence against Planned Parenthood and other clinics servicing fundamental care to women across the country.

**Take action[today. Click the link below to demand Republicans denounce violence against Planned Parenthood:](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea76c/e60883a/7024ef30/14420e95/1449634896/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Stop-Inciting-Violence?fname=&lname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")**
